mc.compiler.token.Token

    mc.compiler

    • Uses of Token in mc.compiler

      Fields in mc.compiler with type parameters of type Token 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private java.util.List<Token> Parser.tokens 
      Methods in mc.compiler that return Token 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private Token Lexer.constructStringToken(java.lang.String string) 
      private Token Lexer.constructSymbolToken(char[] characters) 
      private Token Parser.nextToken()
      Helper method that retrieves the next @code{Token} and moves the index position to point to the next @code{Token}.
      private Token Parser.peekToken()
      Helper method that retrieves the next @code{Token} without incrementing the index position.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
